jokes.setup: I told my doctor I broke my arm in two places.
jokes.punchline: He told me to stop going to those places.
jokes.author: admin

jokes.setup: Why do we tell actors to break a leg?
jokes.punchline: Because every play has a cast.
jokes.author: admin

jokes.setup: I asked my dog what two minus two is.
jokes.author: admin

jokes.setup: My wife told me to stop acting like a flamingo.
jokes.punchline: I had to put my foot down.
jokes.author: admin

jokes.setup: Why did the scarecrow win an award?
jokes.punchline: Because he was outstanding in his field.
jokes.author: admin

jokes.setup: A man walks into a library and asks for books about paranoia.
jokes.punchline: The librarian whispers: They are right behind you.
jokes.author: admin

jokes.punchline: Because their horns do not work.
jokes.author: admin

jokes.setup: I am reading a book about anti-gravity.
jokes.punchline: It is impossible to put down.
jokes.author: admin

jokes.setup: What do you call a fish without eyes?
jokes.author: admin

jokes.setup: What do you call cheese that is not yours?
jokes.author: admin
